title: What Isotopes Are
script_summary: Explore the fascinating world of isotopes and their diverse applications.

segments.voiceover: Same element, different neutron count! What does it mean?
Isotopes are versions of elements with differing numbers of neutrons.
They play crucial roles in fields like medicine, dating artifacts, and climate science.
For example, carbon-14 helps us date ancient bones, while iodine-131 is vital in medical imaging.
Understanding isotopes opens doors to new discoveries in our world.
Dive deeper into science! Like, share, and subscribe for more!
